title: How Aehr Test Systems Stock Rose 144% Last Month
text: Aehr Test Systems experienced explosive growth in April 2026, with shares surging 144.2% during the month. The company's unfilled orders reached $38.7 million by quarter-end, nearly double the $18.2 million from the prior year. Management unveiled a historic $41 million deal from an existing hyperscale customer on April 16, including high-end testing systems and burn-in modules. Chipmakers are increasingly adopting burn-in processes to identify manufacturing defects early, positioning Aehr to benefit from this industry shift. By May 5, 2026, the stock had gained a staggering 1,004% in 52 weeks. The valuation carries significant risk given the company's 608x forward earnings multiple and execution challenges ahead. The company's momentum reflects strong demand from data center and AI infrastructure customers.
